Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class MapValidatorImpl<K,V>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<MapValidator<K,V>,Map<K,V>>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.MapValidatorImpl<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of key in the map
V - the type of value in the map
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<MapValidator<K,V>,Map<K,V>>, MapValidator<K,V>
public final class MapValidatorImpl<K,V> extends AbstractObjectValidator<MapValidator<K,V>,Map<K,V>> implements MapValidator<K,V>
Default implementation of MapValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • MapValidatorImpl

      public MapValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Map<K,V> actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
